mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_PRINT_MODEL( ID, MODEL_TYPE_CODE, MODEL_TYPE_NAME, MODEL_NAME, MODEL_CONTENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES( #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{modelTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId}, #{loginUserName}, #{now} )
mapper.update: UPDATE M_PRINT_MODEL SET MODEL_TYPE_CODE = #{modelTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MODEL_TYPE_NAME = #{modelTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MODEL_NAME = #{modelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MODEL_CONTENT = #{modelContent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId}, UPDATE_NAME = #{loginUserName}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now} WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, MODEL_TYPE_CODE, MODEL_TYPE_NAME, MODEL_NAME, MODEL_CONTENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM M_PRINT_MODEL
AND (MODEL_NAME LIKE #{modelName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
AND (MODEL_TYPE_CODE LIKE #{modelTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
SELECT ID, MODEL_TYPE_CODE, MODEL_TYPE_NAME, MODEL_NAME, MODEL_CONTENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM M_PRINT_MODEL WHERE ID = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
SELECT ID, MODEL_TYPE_CODE, MODEL_TYPE_NAME, MODEL_NAME, MODEL_CONTENT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_NAME, CREATE_TIME FROM M_PRINT_MODEL
